description: Celebrate the Lunar New Year 2023 with our specially crafted email template, perfect for restaurants offering Asian food. This vibrant template is designed to encapsulate the festive spirit of the Chinese New Year, an ideal way to promote your exclusive menu and delivery services. Entice your customers with irresistible discounts and offers, adding a festive touch to their dining experience. Falling under the Seasonal, Food and Beverage, and Chinese New Year themes, this email template is a must-have for boosting your restaurant's marketing strategy during this auspicious occasion. Make this Lunar New Year a profitable one for your restaurant with our stunning email template.
short_description: Celebrate Lunar New Year 2023 with our vibrant email template for restaurants offering Asian food. Promote your menu, delivery services, and exclusive discounts this Chinese New Year. Boost your marketing strategy and profitability with our festive template.

designer.description: I have a degree in graphic design and I am dedicated to the world of communication providing graphic solutions to companies to get the best out of them. I consider myself a detail-oriented, demanding and multidisciplinary person, passionate about the world of communication. I believe in design as a powerful tool to communicate values, ideas and emotions, this is what I try to transfer in any project to always get the best result.
